---
title: "Data Replication"
format: html
---

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

sheets <- excel_sheets("/Users/nikhilakalapatapu/Downloads/Raw Data for Data Replication Project.xlsx")
sheets

#Describe the columns 
NOR_data <- read_excel("/Users/nikhilakalapatapu/Downloads/Raw Data for Data Replication Project.xlsx", sheet = 11)
NOR_data

NOR_data %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_novel = mean(New, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_familiar = mean(Old, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_novel = sd(New, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_familiar = sd(Old, na.rm = TRUE), 
    mean_ratio = mean(Ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

NOR_data <- NOR_data %>%
  mutate(Ratio = as.numeric(Ratio))
  
ggplot(NOR_data, aes(x = Group, y = Ratio, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) + 
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Average Percentage of Time Spent Exploring the Novel Object", x = "Experimental       Condition", y = "Average Percentage") + 
  theme_minimal()

#T-test to determine whether or not the mean percentage of time spent exploring the novel object is significantly different between control and EtOH-treated mice. 
t.test(Ratio ~ Group, data = NOR_data)
#Since the p-value is 0.000089, the mean percentage of time spent exploring the novel object is significantly different between control and EtOH-treated mice.

#WB
WB_data <- read_excel("/Users/nikhilakalapatapu/Downloads/Raw Data for Data Replication Project.xlsx", sheet = 5)
WB_data

WB_data <- WB_data %>%
 mutate(
  ZO1_GAPDH = `ZO-1`/GAPDH,
  Occludin_GAPDH = Occludin/GAPDH,
  Claudin5_GAPDH = `Claudin-5`/GAPDH
 )
WB_data

WB_data %>%
  filter(Region == "PFC") %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
  n = n(),
  mean_ZO1_GAPDH = mean(ZO1_GAPDH),
  mean_Occludin_GAPDH = mean(Occludin_GAPDH),
  mean_Claudin5_GAPDH = mean(Claudin5_GAPDH)
  )

WB_data %>%
  filter(Region == "Hippocampus") %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
  n = n(),
  mean_ZO1_GAPDH = mean(ZO1_GAPDH),
  mean_Occludin_GAPDH = mean(Occludin_GAPDH),
  mean_Claudin5_GAPDH = mean(Claudin5_GAPDH)
  )
  

model_ZO1 <- aov(ZO1_GAPDH ~ Group * Region, data = WB_data)
summary(model_ZO1)
model_Occludin <- aov(Occludin_GAPDH ~ Group * Region, data = WB_data)
summary(model_Occludin)
model_Claudin5 <- aov(Claudin5_GAPDH ~ Group * Region, data = WB_data)
summary(model_Claudin5)
